svg.text: Split by model family: does the dial → direction story hold within each family? Background =
the model's forecast 4-round move; each dot = the run's observed whole-run move — same units
one dot per run · 56 modelable runs from experiments/spread_util_unified.json (round-1 record per run), split on the record's “organism” field
Both panels share the identical background = Δv_pred(4) = clip[−1,+1] of 4·ρ·σ (one selection step ρσ per
round, wall-capped), drawn on the dots' own endpoint-move color scale.
round-1 agreement ρ = corr(judge scores, value scores)
round-1 agreement ρ = corr(judge scores, value scores)
round-1 spread σ = within-prompt SD of value scores
OLMo carries every one of the 6 clashes.
Scope: 4-round runs only — the 11 eight-round judge-schedule runs are excluded and 7 runs are skipped for undefined ρ (zero
within-pool spread), leaving 56 of 74 runs. R = 4 is every plotted run's exact horizon. Mixed-pool runs also feel the outside-source
pull (p − q), so the 4·ρσ background is the self-only force map — sign and relative magnitude are what compare.
